zh.Ewedon, Hambleden, Buckinghamshire, Engl: 英國巴金哈姆爾哈布萊登

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Knollys於1430年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Richard Knollys28歲，母親Margaret d'Oyley10歲。她於1462年之前與Richard Flynte結婚。她去世於1488年10月7日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Knollys于1430年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir Richard Knollys28岁，母亲Margaret d'Oyley10岁。她于1462年之前与Richard Flynte结婚。她去世于1488年10月7日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年58岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Knollys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knowles
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English knol(le) ‘knoll, hilltop’ (Old English cnoll) or from any of the many places (some lost) named with this word, for example Knowle (Devon, Dorset, Lancashire, Somerset, Warwickshire, and Yorkshire) and Knole (Kent, Sussex).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tnúthghail (see Newell ).
English: variant of Noel , often, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Knollys was born in 1430, in England, her father, Sir Richard Knollys, was 28 and her mother, Margaret d'Oyley, was 10. She married Richard Flynte before 1462. She died on 7 October 1488, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Knollys est née en 1430, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Knollys, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret d'Oyley, avait 10 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Flynte avant 1462. Elle est décédée le 7 octobre 1488, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Knollys 1430 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Knollys 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret d'Oyley 10. Sie hat vor 1462 Richard Flynte geheiratet. Sie starb am 7. Oktober 1488 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Knollys è nata il nel 1430 nel England, sua padre, Sir Richard Knollys, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret d'Oyley, aveva 10 anni. Lei sposato Richard Flynte prima del 1462. Morì il 7 ottobre 1488, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Knollysが1430年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Knollysは28歳，母Margaret d'Oyleyは10歳であった。1462年以前にRichard Flynteと結婚した。彼女は1488年10月7日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで58歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Knollys(이)가 1430년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Knollys(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret d'Oyley(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 1462년 이전 Richard Flynte(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1488년 10월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Knollys nasceu em 1430, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Knollys, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret d'Oyley, tinha 10 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Flynte antes 1462. Ela faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1488, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Knollys родилась в 1430 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Knollys было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret d'Oyley, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Flynte перед 1462 г. Она умерла 7 октября 1488 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Knollys nació en 1430, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Knollys, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret d'Oyley, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Richard Flynte antes de 1462. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1488, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
